name: Gao

skills.name: Guitar Solo
skills.description: For every 3 Basic Attacks or skills Gao uses, his Basic Attack is enhanced,dealing damage on hit.

skills.name: Wild Chord
skills.description: Launches musical notes that bounce between enemies, dealing damage.

skills.name: String Bender
skills.description: Damages and slows enemies within range. Hits on heroes restore Health, and he gains damage reduction during the dash.

skills.name: Rock Out!
skills.description: Gains Movement Speed and damage reduction while dealing continuous damage to enemies within range.
